close_reason: Design complete: docs/design-use-turnkey.md covers API, flags (--skip-regen, --only-go, etc.), env vars (TURNKEY_SKIP_GO), and Nix generation approach
description: Design the API for a use_turnkey direnv function that encapsulates: (1) hash-based dependency regeneration for Go/Python/Rust, (2) symlink syncing for Buck2 cells, (3) watch_file declarations. Consider how to make it configurable (which languages to enable, custom paths).
title: Design use_turnkey direnv function
